_doc: Worldgen tuning consumed by elevation_map.gd, anchor_planner.gd,
skill_site_spawner.gd and chunk_renderer.gd. All values are data-only:
tweak here, no generator code changes needed.
elevation.bounds: upper height-field bound for levels 0..6 (level 7 is
everything above the last bound). Levels: 0 deep water, 1 shallow water,
2 lowland, 3 normal land, 4 hill, 5 high hill, 6 mountain, 7 peak.
ruggedFreq/ruggedAmp: small jitter noise added to height before banding so
terrace contours break up instead of tracing smooth noise isolines.
cliffShade/cliffHighlight: render-time darkening below an elevation step
and lightening on its top edge. highlandTintPerLevel: ground lightening
per level above 3, suggesting thin rocky soil at altitude.
resources.elevationDensity: per-skill multiplier indexed by elevation
level 0..7. 0 disables the skill at that level; >1 boosts it (Luanti-style
ore y-range scarcity, flattened to our 8 levels).
roads.tile: byte tile painted along corridors between the home camp and
nearby anchors. halfWidth in tiles; wobble makes paths meander instead of
ruler lines; connectHubs: how many nearest anchors get a road from home.
